JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT. PLTF TO PREPARE JDMT, TO INCLUDE R MANZO AFTER PROVE-UP. #3 CHOPPELAS/BRADY/LEONG - C/C FOR TRIAL; DEFT. MANZO NOT PRESENT; PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED; COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MARGARITA MANZO, RODOLFO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2855 FOLSOM ST. SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59PM.
